day.name: NVE Corporation
day.summary: NVE Corporation develops and sells devices that use spintronics, a nanotechnology relying on electron spin to acquire, store, and transmit information in the United States. The company manufactures spintronic products, including sensors and couplers for use in sensing and transmitting data.
